file.content:
# Plan: Update Plans Page Header to Be Taller

## Task Description
Increase the height of the plans page collection header (`merch-card-collection-header.plans`) by overriding the header height CSS custom properties in the plans variant styles. No specific target height was provided, so apply a ~50% increase from the current default of 44px → 66px.

## Relevant Files

- `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` — **edit**: add height overrides to the `merch-card-collection-header.plans` selector block (lines 256–259) to increase filter and search heights.

## Step by Step Tasks

### 1. Read the current `merch-card-collection-header.plans` block
- Open `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`
- Locate the `merch-card-collection-header.plans` rule at ~line 256
- Confirm existing properties: `--merch-card-collection-header-columns` and `--merch-card-collection-header-areas`

### 2. Add height override variables
- Inside `merch-card-collection-header.plans { ... }`, add:
  ```css
  --merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px;
  --merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px;
  ```
- These variables propagate automatically to the filter button (`#filter`), sort button (`#sort`, which inherits from filter height), and search input (`#search sp-search`) via the base component's CSS in `merch-card-collection.js`.

### 3. Verify no layout breakage in the desktop override
- The desktop media query at ~line 427 also has a `merch-card-collection-header.plans` block (overriding column/area layout only).
- The height variables added in step 2 apply globally and will remain in effect at desktop unless overridden — this is the desired behavior.
- No additional desktop override is needed unless a distinct desktop height is specified.

### 4. Validate JS syntax
- Run `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `merch-card-collection-header.plans` renders with a taller header (~66px) compared to the default (44px).
- The filter button, sort button, and search input inside the header are all taller.
- No layout regression below the header (card grid, sidenav, content sections remain unaffected).
- `node --check` passes with no syntax errors.

## Validation Commands
- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`

tool_input.command: git diff HEAD~1 --stat && echo "---" && git diff HEAD~1

commit 6affb506adbcb4466e384e54c311b7b6240feda9
Author: Agentic Kin <jq.rivero@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Mar 25 02:53:25 2026 -0700

    feat(plans): increase collection header height from 44px to 66px
    
    Overrides --merch-card-collection-header-filter-height and
    --merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height in the plans
    variant to render a taller header (~50% increase).
    
    Closes #7
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js | 2 ++
